# Royal Fish — Rotterdam Markthal

> Royal Fish is a fresh seafood restaurant and fish stall located on Floor G of Markthal Rotterdam, Netherlands. Specialising in Hollandse Nieuwe (Dutch herring), kibbeling (battered fried fish), oysters, mussels and the daily fresh catch.

## About

Royal Fish was founded by real fish specialists with more than 30 years of experience in the fish market. When the iconic Markthal Rotterdam opened in 2014, the owners seized the opportunity to bring their craft inside one of Europe's most celebrated indoor food markets.

Royal Fish stands for fresh fish, pure fried dishes, delicious mussels, delicious herring, beautiful wine and excellent service. All fish dishes are homemade. Fish is bought fresh every day. Fried fish is cooked right in front of guests — a real delicacy from an extensive menu.

## Location

- **Address:** Dominee Jan Scharpstraat 298, 3011 GX Rotterdam, Netherlands
- **Location:** Floor G, Markthal Rotterdam
- **Coordinates:** 51.9201° N, 4.4875° E
- **Plus Code:** WF9P+VJ Rotterdam, NL

## Opening Hours

| Days               | Hours       |
|--------------------|-------------|
| Monday – Thursday  | 10:00–20:00 |
| Friday – Saturday  | 10:00–21:00 |
| Sunday             | 12:00–18:00 |

## Menu Highlights

- **Hollandse Nieuwe** — Traditional Dutch raw herring with onions and pickles
- **Kibbeling** — Crispy golden fried white fish chunks with garlic sauce
- **Oysters** — Fresh, hand-shucked daily
- **Mussels** — Steamed to order with classic marinière broth
- **Hake fillet** — Pan-fried or battered, served with fries
- **Seafood platter** — The Royal Fish signature mixed selection
- **Broodje haring** — Classic Dutch herring sandwich
- **Grolsch on tap** — Dutch draft beer to pair with your fish

Price range: €10–20 per person.

## Services

- Dine-in seating available inside the Markthal
- Takeaway orders
- Delivery available

## Reviews & Ratings

- **Google Rating:** 4.1 / 5 (based on 178 reviews)
- Most mentioned: kibbeling, herring, mussels, hake

Sample reviews:
- *"Located right in the heart of the food hall, this place is such a gem. The seafood is fantastic, the service is warm and welcoming."* — Hollis Travel, Local Guide
- *"Tried the herring and it surprised me — good and not fishy at all. Mussels were really good."* — Winson, Local Guide
- *"The kibbeling here is the best I've had in Rotterdam — crispy outside, tender fish inside."* — Thomas B.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Where is Royal Fish located?**
Royal Fish is located at Floor G of Markthal Rotterdam, at Dominee Jan Scharpstraat 298, 3011 GX Rotterdam, Netherlands.

**What are Royal Fish's opening hours?**
Monday to Thursday: 10:00–20:00. Friday and Saturday: 10:00–21:00. Sunday: 12:00–18:00.

**What is kibbeling?**
Kibbeling is a popular Dutch street food of battered and fried white fish chunks, typically served with a creamy garlic or remoulade sauce. Royal Fish's kibbeling is made fresh daily.

**What is Hollandse Nieuwe?**
Hollandse Nieuwe is the first raw herring of the season, a Dutch delicacy. It is served with diced onions and pickles and is considered one of the freshest, cleanest-tasting fish dishes in Dutch cuisine.

**Does Royal Fish do takeaway?**
Yes. Royal Fish offers dine-in, takeaway and delivery options.

**Is Royal Fish good for tourists visiting Rotterdam?**
Yes. Royal Fish is one of the most recommended seafood spots for visitors to Rotterdam's Markthal, which is itself a must-visit architectural landmark.

**What is the price range at Royal Fish?**
The average spend is €10–20 per person.

- **Get directions:** https://www.google.com/maps/dir/?api=1&destination=Markthal+Rotterdam
